subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in the Most Exalted Beauty, been drawn unto the Most Glorious Kingdom, and been set ablaze by the kindled Fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بالجمال الاعلی و انجذب الی الملکوت الابهی و اشتعل بالنار الموقده
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love of God, @importance of community building
